title: Apply automotive body and paint knowledge to vehicle loss assessments
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Apply automotive body and paint knowledge to vehicle loss assessments demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Develop and apply an understanding of automotive paintwork knowledge

pcs.text: Knowledge of operating principles of paint preparation, application, and refinishing process and techniques, including paint products and imperfection identification is developed1.2 Knowledge of paint preparation and paint product is applied to loss assessment processes1.3 Paintwork damage is identified using colour matching techniques
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Knowledge of operating principles of paint preparation, application, and refinishing process and techniques, including paint products and imperfection identification is developed1.2 Knowledge of paint preparation and paint product is applied to loss assessment processes1.3 Paintwork damage is identified using colour matching techniques?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Knowledge of operating principles of paint preparation, application, and refinishing process and techniques, including paint products and imperfection identification is developed1.2 Knowledge of paint preparation and paint product is applied to loss assessment processes1.3 Paintwork damage is identified using colour matching techniques.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Develop and apply an understanding of automotive paintwork knowledge

elements.title: Develop and apply an understanding of automotive body knowledge

pcs.text: Knowledge of operating principles of vehicle structure is developed2.2 knowledge of operating principles of vehicle supplementary restraint systems (SRS) is developed2.3 Knowledge of operating principles of vehicle body repair procedures is developed2.4 Knowledge of vehicle structure, SRS and body repair procedures is applied to loss assessment processes, procedures and policies2.5 Bodywork damage is identified
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Knowledge of operating principles of vehicle structure is developed2.2 knowledge of operating principles of vehicle supplementary restraint systems (SRS) is developed2.3 Knowledge of operating principles of vehicle body repair procedures is developed2.4 Knowledge of vehicle structure, SRS and body repair procedures is applied to loss assessment processes, procedures and policies2.5 Bodywork damage is identified?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Knowledge of operating principles of vehicle structure is developed2.2 knowledge of operating principles of vehicle supplementary restraint systems (SRS) is developed2.3 Knowledge of operating principles of vehicle body repair procedures is developed2.4 Knowledge of vehicle structure, SRS and body repair procedures is applied to loss assessment processes, procedures and policies2.5 Bodywork damage is identified.

elements.title: Develop and apply an understanding of advanced specialist vehicle information

pcs.text: Knowledge of specific vehicle types is developed, clarified where necessary, and applied to loss assessment processes, procedures and policies3.2 Knowledge of latest technology relating to automotive paint and bodywork is developed, clarified where necessary, and applied to loss assessment processes, procedures and policies3.3 Research techniques and advanced specialist vehicle knowledge are employed in order to identify vehicle damage
